summary: Regression retest after one-line z-index fix in Game.jsx (corner control wrapper z-30 -> z-50). PRIMARY mute-toggle bug from iteration_3 is FIXED. Verified via non-forced Playwright clicks on EVERY screen — menu (toggled twice ON->OFF->ON), leaderboard (toggled), playing (toggled), paused (toggled), gameover (toggled). Text on [data-testid='mute-toggle'] flips correctly between 'SOUND ON' and 'SOUND OFF'. Regression: full menu->play->pause->resume->natural gameover flow still works; leaderboard fetch+close works; pause-button click + resume-button click work; 0 console errors. Backend pytest 20/20 PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix is minimal/correct (z-30 -> z-50 on corner control wrapper at Game.jsx line 210). Mute-toggle now sits above all overlays (z-40).
Wrapper also retains data-ui-overlay='true' so the canvas pointerdown handler ignores clicks on the corner controls — good defense in depth.

Optional follow-up (non-blocking, carried over from iteration_3 review): the four overlay components (MenuScreen/PauseScreen/GameOverScreen/Leaderboard) still each declare 'absolute inset-0 z-40' independently — could be DRYed into a shared <Overlay> primitive to prevent future regressions; add pointer-events-none on the shell with pointer-events-auto on the inner panel as a structural safeguard.
rAF effect deps still include [gravityDir, handleDeath] (re-subscribes on each gravity flip) — minor inefficiency, not a bug.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (6/6 mute-toggle scenarios PASS via non-forced clicks; full regression flow PASS; 0 console errors)

context_for_next_testing_agent: GRAV-SHIFT mute-toggle z-index fix verified end-to-end. Backend regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_gravshift_api.py (pytest, 20 tests). Frontend testids of interest: mute-toggle, pause-button, resume-button, play-button, leaderboard-button, leaderboard-close, retry-button, game-over-screen. Use NON-FORCED Playwright clicks for any future overlay/z-index regression checks (force=True silently masks click-through bugs).
rca of the issue: Iteration_3 RCA was correct: corner control wrapper at z-30 was beneath overlay screens at z-40. Main agent applied the recommended one-line fix (z-30 -> z-50 in Game.jsx line ~210). Verified: document.elementFromPoint at the mute-toggle coords now returns the button (textContent flips on every click on every screen).
